hero.headline: Give the Gift of The Meridian
hero.subline: The perfect gift for any occasion.

purchaseNote: To purchase, please call us or visit in person.
inPersonNote: Available at the host stand during service.

giftingIdeas.title: Birthday
giftingIdeas.description: Celebrate with an unforgettable dining experience — a gift they'll truly remember.

giftingIdeas.title: Anniversary
giftingIdeas.description: Mark the milestone with a special evening at The Meridian. Add a bottle from our cellar.

giftingIdeas.title: Corporate Gifting
giftingIdeas.description: Impress clients and reward your team with gift cards in any amount. Bulk orders welcome.

steps: Present your gift card to your server at the start of your meal.
The card balance will be applied to your check.
Any remaining balance stays on the card for your next visit.
redemption.validity: Valid for 5 years from date of purchase.
